required_skills: Growth Experimentation and A/B Testing at Scale
Funnel Analysis and User Lifecycle Modeling
Quantitative Data Analysis and Statistical Significance
Growth Loops and Viral Coefficient Design
Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Referral, Revenue (AARRR) Framework
preferred_skills: SQL proficiency for self-serve funnel and cohort queries
Mobile growth and App Store Optimization (ASO)
Push notification, email, and in-app messaging optimization
Network effects and referral program design
Paid acquisition channel integration with product onboarding
International market expansion and localization growth tactics
responsibilities: Design, prioritize, and execute a high-velocity experimentation roadmap targeting acquisition, activation, and retention funnels to drive sustainable user growth
Develop and own the North Star Metric and supporting growth KPI tree, aligning cross-functional growth squads around measurable user and revenue outcomes
Analyze full-funnel user behavior using cohort analysis, funnel visualization, and segmentation tools to identify friction points and high-leverage optimization opportunities
Build and iterate on onboarding flows, activation sequences, and time-to-value pathways that maximize new user retention and feature adoption rates
Lead structured A/B and multivariate experiments end-to-end including hypothesis formulation, experiment design, significance validation, and learnings documentation
Collaborate with marketing and data engineering teams to implement and optimize multi-touch attribution models and growth analytics instrumentation
Design and optimize referral programs, viral loops, and network-effect mechanisms that reduce customer acquisition cost (CAC) and improve organic growth
Partner with monetization and finance teams to run pricing experiments, paywall optimizations, and upsell flow improvements that increase LTV and ARPU
Instrument product events and user properties in collaboration with data engineers to ensure clean, reliable data for growth analysis and personalization
Present growth experiment results, learnings, and roadmap recommendations to senior leadership and cross-functional stakeholders in weekly and quarterly reviews
